servinfo.title: Steering Gear Case Assembly Removal and Installation

attention4.ptxt: Failure to take proper precautions before starting the procedure below can result in damage to the contact coil of the air bag system.
Before starting the procedure below, set the front wheels in the straight-ahead position and then lock the steering wheel by changing ignition mode to OFF.

s1.ptxt: Remove front suspension frame with steering gear case assembly.
Remove steering gear case cover (1) after detaching its claws (3) from gear case.
Remove steering bracket member nuts (4), steering gear case bolts (5) and steering bracket members (6), then remove steering gear case assembly (2) from front suspension frame.
Mount steering gear case assembly (1) to front suspension frame.
Install steering bracket members (2), and then tighten new steering gear case bolts (3) and steering bracket member nuts (4) to specified torques.

attention4.ptxt: The steering gear case bolts are pre-coated with friction stabilizer. If these bolts are reused, they may work loose.
Never reuse the steering gear case bolts.

s1.ptxt: Align grooves (5) in steering gear case (1) and steering gear cover (6) with each other.
Install steering gear cover (6) to steering gear case (1).
Install front suspension frame with steering gear case assembly.
